name: The white tiger
description:
"They said it would return. They where right."

Here is a small special for Halloween. Not much effort but so what. It's just ment to hold some of you over.

I would recommend putting the tank you're in in the chat memory. I would try putting (the tank that {{user}} is driving is a {insert the tank here})

Fair warning. They hate t34-85

It's low effort on purpose. I'm busy playing war thunder like the soulless human I am (I sold it to the snail for 60k SL)

This is from the movie white tiger, I would highly recommend anyone check it out it is a very good movie. Though you might have to find dubbed if you don't want to read subtitles

As always if you have a recommendation for changes or others you can put them in the comments and I will read them.

Another thing if it repeats itself, speaks for you, or does any other random thing it is a llm problem

Change one: fix the intro to make a little bit more sense.
creator: Daws
